zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron William Hastings於1430年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾科比 姆可洛時，他的父親Sir Leonard Hastings34歲，母親Alice Camoys30歲。他於1462年2月6日與Catherine Neville在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1471年登記服兵役。他於1474年被列為appointed constable and steward of the honour of tutbury。他去世於1483年6月13日在英國英格蘭米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏溫莎女爵聖 格奧智也斯 查阿培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baron William Hastings于1430年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾科比 姆可洛时，他的父亲Sir Leonard Hastings34岁，母亲Alice Camoys30岁。他于1462年2月6日与Catherine Neville在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1471年登记服兵役。他于1474年被列为appointed constable and steward of the honour of tutbury。他去世于1483年6月13日在英国英格兰米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏溫莎女爵聖 格奧智也斯 查阿培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron William Hastings was born in 1430, in Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England, his father, Sir Leonard Hastings, was 34 and his mother, Alice Camoys, was 30. He married Catherine Neville on 6 February 1462, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1471. In 1474, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as appointed constable and steward of the honour of tutbury. He died on 13 June 1483, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron William Hastings est né en 1430, à Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Leonard Hastings, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice Camoys, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Neville le 6 février 1462, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1471. En 1474, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est appointed constable and steward of the honour of tutbury. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1483, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron William Hastings 1430 in Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Leonard Hastings 34 und seine Mutter Alice Camoys 30. Er hat am 6. Februar 1462 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Catherine Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1471 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1474, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als appointed constable and steward of the honour of tutbury aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. Juni 1483 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron William Hastings è nato il nel 1430 nel Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Leonard Hastings, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Alice Camoys, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Neville il 6 febbraio 1462, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1471. Nel 1474, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come appointed constable and steward of the honour of tutbury. Morì il 13 giugno 1483, nel Tower of London, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron William Hastingsが1430年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルビー ムクスロで生まれた時，父Sir Leonard Hastingsは34歳，母Alice Camoysは30歳であった。1462年2月6日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでCatherine Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年に兵役登録をした。1474年，44歳の時，職業はappointed constable and steward of the honour of tutburyと記録されている。彼は1483年6月13日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソルスト ジョージェ'ス チャペルにて埋葬された。

ko.Stgeorgeschapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 윈드소르 스트 조그'스 차플

ko.lifeSummary: Baron William Hastings(이)가 1430년 영국 레이스스터실르 커비 무스로이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Leonard Hastings(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Camoys(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1462년 2월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Catherine Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1474년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 appointed constable and steward of the honour of tutbury이었다. 그는 1483년 6월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 윈드소르 스트 조그'스 차플에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron William Hastings nasceu em 1430, em Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Leonard Hastings, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice Camoys, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Neville em 6 de fevereiro de 1462, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1471. Em 1474, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como appointed constable and steward of the honour of tutbury. Ele faleceu em 13 de junho de 1483, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron William Hastings родился в 1430 г. в местности кирби муксло, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Leonard Hastings было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Camoys, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Neville 6 февраля 1462 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1471 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1474 году, в возрасте 44 лет, работал по профессии appointed constable and steward of the honour of tutbury. Он умер 13 июня 1483 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ст джеорге'с чапел, виндзор, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baron William Hastings nació en 1430, en Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Leonard Hastings, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice Camoys, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Catherine Neville el 6 de febrero de 1462, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1471. En 1474, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era appointed constable and steward of the honour of tutbury. Murió el 13 de junio de 1483, en Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
